news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank gained 1.9%, rising from Rs.32.16 to Rs.32.77, outperforming Sensex's -0.29%.
The stock hit a 52-week low on 30 March before recovering due to valuation improvement and rating upgrade.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank gained 1.9%, rising from Rs.32.16 to Rs.32.77, outperforming Sensex's -0.29%.
The stock hit a 52-week low on 30 March before recovering due to valuation improvement and rating upgrade.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank paid Rs.57.2 Cr annual interest on Basel III Tier II Bonds Series IV.
Interest payment was made on 31.03.2026; record date was 16.03.2026.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank paid Rs.57.2 Cr annual interest on Basel III Tier II Bonds Series IV.
Interest payment was made on 31.03.2026; record date was 16.03.2026.

news.title:
6 Nifty 500 stocks with consistent 2025 PAT growth fell up to 35% YTD, despite earnings momentum.
Aegis Vopak, SBFC, IOB, and Muthoot Finance face pressures from rising crude, inflation, and market volatility.
news.summary:
6 Nifty 500 stocks with consistent 2025 PAT growth fell up to 35% YTD, despite earnings momentum.
Aegis Vopak, SBFC, IOB, and Muthoot Finance face pressures from rising crude, inflation, and market volatility.

news.title: Indian Overseas Bank faces a penalty order of ₹82.4M.
news.summary: Indian Overseas Bank faces a penalty order of ₹82.4M.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank gained 3.55%, rising from Rs.32.64 to Rs.33.80, outperforming Sensex's 0.28% decline.
The week saw volatility, 52-week low, valuation upgrades, and a strong rebound on the final day.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank gained 3.55%, rising from Rs.32.64 to Rs.33.80, outperforming Sensex's 0.28% decline.
The week saw volatility, 52-week low, valuation upgrades, and a strong rebound on the final day.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank's valuation shifted from fair to attractive amid challenges.
PE and PBV ratios compared to historical and peer averages highlight price appeal.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank's valuation shifted from fair to attractive amid challenges.
PE and PBV ratios compared to historical and peer averages highlight price appeal.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank receives Rs. 642.74 crore tax demand for FY 2016-17.
Bank plans to appeal and disputes the demand; no financial impact assumed yet.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank receives Rs. 642.74 crore tax demand for FY 2016-17.
Bank plans to appeal and disputes the demand; no financial impact assumed yet.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive, boosting investor appeal.
Improved financial metrics and peer outperformance enhance IOB's market positioning and investment potential.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive, boosting investor appeal.
Improved financial metrics and peer outperformance enhance IOB's market positioning and investment potential.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank plans non-deal roadshows from 17 Mar 2026, sharing financials, strategies.
Q3 FY26 net profit at 3703 Cr; CASA strong at 40.85%, GNPA low at 1.54%.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank plans non-deal roadshows from 17 Mar 2026, sharing financials, strategies.
Q3 FY26 net profit at 3703 Cr; CASA strong at 40.85%, GNPA low at 1.54%.

news.title:
Nifty PSU Bank index falls for fourth day, down 0.6%, impacted by rising bond yields and crude oil prices.
March losses reach 14%, with Punjab & Sind Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, UCO Bank hitting 52-week lows.
news.summary:
Nifty PSU Bank index falls for fourth day, down 0.6%, impacted by rising bond yields and crude oil prices.
March losses reach 14%, with Punjab & Sind Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, UCO Bank hitting 52-week lows.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank hit a 52-week low of Rs.31.82 on March 16, 2026.
The stock underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting weakness.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank hit a 52-week low of Rs.31.82 on March 16, 2026.
The stock underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting weakness.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank plans non-deal roadshows to meet institutional investors from 13.03.2026.
Meetings will include one-on-one calls and in-person sessions, adhering to SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank plans non-deal roadshows to meet institutional investors from 13.03.2026.
Meetings will include one-on-one calls and in-person sessions, adhering to SEBI regulations.

news.title:
IOB received an I-T demand notice for Rs 766cr related to AY 2015-16.
The notice concerns income re-computation and claim disallowances, IOB informed exchanges.
news.summary:
IOB received an I-T demand notice for Rs 766cr related to AY 2015-16.
The notice concerns income re-computation and claim disallowances, IOB informed exchanges.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank receives IT demand notice of Rs. 766 Cr for AY 2015-16.
Bank appeals against disallowances; expects no financial impact from the notice.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank receives IT demand notice of Rs. 766 Cr for AY 2015-16.
Bank appeals against disallowances; expects no financial impact from the notice.

news.title:
IOB seeks more time to reduce govt stake to 75% via QIP, OFS.
Govt stake dropped from 96% to 92.4%; Rs 4,000 cr QIP planned FY26.
news.summary:
IOB seeks more time to reduce govt stake to 75% via QIP, OFS.
Govt stake dropped from 96% to 92.4%; Rs 4,000 cr QIP planned FY26.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank sets record dates for Basel III Tier II Bonds.
Series IV coupon rate is 8.6%, due 16 Mar 2026; Series V is 9%, due 9 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank sets record dates for Basel III Tier II Bonds.
Series IV coupon rate is 8.6%, due 16 Mar 2026; Series V is 9%, due 9 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Indian Overseas Bank (IOB) received 'BBB Stable' long-term and 'A-2' short-term issuer credit ratings from S&P Global Ratings.
The stable outlook reflects IOB's strong capitalization, funding, and liquidity profile, alongside high government support likelihood.
news.summary:
Indian Overseas Bank (IOB) received 'BBB Stable' long-term and 'A-2' short-term issuer credit ratings from S&P Global Ratings.
The stable outlook reflects IOB's strong capitalization, funding, and liquidity profile, alongside high government support likelihood.

news.title:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.
news.summary:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.

news.title:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.
news.summary:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
